title: celtis micrantha
intro: Celtis micrantha, also known as the Dwarf Hackberry or Small-fruit Hackberry, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Celtis micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Celtis micrantha can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
